{{CargoRelic
|name=Platinum Record
|rank=AA
|affct=FAME
|birthday=06-06
|source=* Expert Scrolls (0.95%), Fragment Crafting (3.9%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Wishing (0.35%)
* [[Altar#Gods_of_the_Pantheon|God of Fame]] Descent
|description=On Jun 6, 1993, this CD that recorded the best dances of the dance king was first released. 

On this day, Michael Jackson performed the moonwalk in his music video for the first time. The move features the performer gliding backward but looking like moving forward, smooth like a devil! After the first performance, fans all over the world became crazy about this dance, which won him the title of Dance king.
|fame=69
|art=43
|fth=42
|civ=43
|tech=31
|ss1=Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail HP +80<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail ATK +8<br>FAME Relics 60/60
|ss2=Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail HP +120<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail ATK +12<br>FAME Relics 60/60
|ss3=Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail HP +160<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail ATK +16<br>FAME Relics 60/60
|ss4=Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail HP +240<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail ATK +24<br>FAME Relics 60/60
|ss5=Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail HP +320<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail ATK +32<br>FAME Relics 60/60
|ss7=Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail HP +320<br>Per 3 FAME Relics gained, Snail ATK +32<br>FAME Relics 60/60<br>Snail HP +700 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]] Place in Exploration Compass: This Relic's FAME +10
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]] Place in Exploration Compass: Snail RUSH +30
}}

[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Relic Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Compass Boost]]
[[Category:FAME Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Minion RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Gene Research Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:Altar Descent Relics]]
[[Category:Enhanced by FAME Relics]]
